name: Grecian Style Shrimp Scampi
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Jumbo Shrimp, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. To make scampi sauce: In a saucepan over low flame, melt butter, adding oil, salt, pepper, rosemary, oregano, paprika, bay leaves, and garlic. Stir in sherry.
3. Place cleaned shrimp in a large baking dish. Cover the shrimp with feta cheese and top with breadcrumbs.
4. Pour scampi sauce over shrimp.
5. Bake until shrimp are tender, approximately 25 minutes.
6. Serve over rice or angel hair pasta.
